law: Observe · Analyze · Search · Learn · Improve — no new render until critic PASS
gpt_alignment: External critic circle — judge acceptability before ship; never repeat weak output

loop.observe: Probe every published MP4 + receipt — duration, resolution, bitrate, audio, capture source
loop.analyze: Score vs video-quality-bar must_have + Linear reference specs
loop.search: Cross-check receipt grade claims vs capture method (grade inflation)
loop.learn: Append incident row — what failed, why, one fix only
loop.improve: Single next action — Screen Studio master OR ingest only; no Playwright hero rerender

acceptability_tiers.S: Screen Studio 4K master + Descript polish — ship publicly
acceptability_tiers.B: Interactive W1 player on site — dev preview, not hero outbound
acceptability_tiers.C: Playwright automated capture — internal only, never public hero
acceptability_tiers.F: Remotion mock / wrong aspect / no audio / grade inflation

frozen_until: Screen Studio W1 five-beat master exists in the repository + critic circle S/A PASS
next_action_only: Record Screen Studio master → bash sourcea-commercial-film-ship.sh or witnessbc-commercial-film-ship.sh
